diagnostic_control_modifications: DC-1: training MSE loss includes velocity channels alongside positions (scaled coordinates)
DC-2: observation vector augmented with per-station visibility flags (n=32->40); h(x) reproduces the flags exactly so innovation on visibility channels is identically zero by construction
labelling: The faithful transposition keeps the upstream KalmanNet architecture, training pipeline, n=32 SPOT-OD observation, position-only loss, and zero-pad-invisible visibility convention unchanged from the linear-canonical sanity check up to dimension. The diagnostic control (KNet-DC) is explicitly NOT a faithful transposition: it is a scientifically defensible normalized/tuned KalmanNet variant whose two modifications (position+velocity loss, visibility-mask augmented observation) probe whether the faithful negative is implementation-specific or fundamental.
